Desert Sun.name: Desert Sun
Desert Sun.description: Unleash the fury of a scorching sun, evaporating all ice with divine heat. The battlefield cracks beneath its blaze.

Flood.name: Flood
Flood.description: Conjure a deluge in a cross-shaped surge, washing away pawns and entombing everyone else in a prison of frost.

Granite Elf.name: Granite Elf
Granite Elf.description: An elven guardian of living stone answers your call. A chosen bishop hardens into an unyielding rook.

Greed.name: Greed
Greed.description: Like a moth to flame, your enemy will try to land on gold.

Heal Pawns.name: Heal Pawns
Heal Pawns.description: By sacred rite, lost footsoldiers rise anew upon the front lines - yet no spirit may return if it would doom a king.

Ice Blast.name: Ice Blast
Ice Blast.description: From the north winds comes a howling curse - a glacial bolt freezes an entire column of the battlefield.

Inspire Soldier.name: Inspire Soldier
Inspire Soldier.description: A chosen pawn hears the call of destiny. Bathed in valor, it ascends early into knighthood and charges forth.

Meteor Shower.name: Meteor Shower
Meteor Shower.description: Tear open the heavens and summon a barrage of flaming stones. The sky falls where you command, scorching all beneath.

Mirror Armies.name: Mirror Armies
Mirror Armies.description: Invoke a spell of perfect symmetry. The battlefield bends toward balance as excess warriors vanish until both sides mirror one another.

One With Light.name: One With Light
One With Light.description: Claim the white banner, and the battle turns anew in your favor.

Orb of Premonition.name: Orb of Premonition
Orb of Premonition.description: Gaze into a shimmering sphere of fate and witness the optimal course - a vision of perfect strategy revealed.

Sacrifice.name: Sacrifice
Sacrifice.description: Offer your queen upon the altar of gain. Her noble death empowers your ranks with two gifts of promotion.

Shadow Step.name: Shadow Step
Shadow Step.description: Your king may step through the folds of shadow and mist, only to reappear in a safe haven beyond blade or spell.

Summon Elf.name: Summon Elf
Summon Elf.description: Call forth a sylvan ally - a graceful bishop born of moonlight. But beware, it will not appear if it offends the sacred balance.

Summon Undead Elves.name: Summon Undead Elves
Summon Undead Elves.description: Through a forbidden rite, fallen bishops rise again as ghostly elves beside your king, provided the summoning does not threaten a monarch.

Wind Storm.name: Wind Storm
Wind Storm.description: Summon a screaming gale from the west. All pieces - friend and foe - are cast one square eastward in chaotic disorder.
